reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
A pesar de ser un lugar privado han pintado los cordones amarillos para no estacionar. Bastante absurdo para una estación de servicio. Y si te estacionas en alguno de esos cordones llama a la policía y te sacan multa.

(Translated by Google)
Despite being private property, they've painted the curbs yellow to prevent parking. Quite absurd for a gas station. And if you park on one of those curbs, call the police and you'll get a ticket.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLOTdMRUtBEAE
